News resources

Art Golab Chicago Sun-Times March 2004
Journalism & Newsroom

When news breaks, journalists can find help at IRE's "In the News" Web pages. The special sections list useful databases, publications and Internet sites that can add depth to deadline reporting. When...

When news breaks, journalists can find help at IRE's "In the News" Web pages. The special sections list useful databases, publications and Internet sites that can add depth to deadline reporting. When a tanker truck fell from an overpass above I- 95 near Baltimore, IRE and NICAR suggested several da- tabases from the U.S. Depart- ment of Transportation contain- ing truck accident and hazard- ous material release reports.

To learn more about this and other resources available, visit www.ire.org/inthenews_archive
